meaning: adv.面向岸,面朝岸,朝向陆地adj.面向岸的,朝向陆地的
examples: But the progress shoreward was slow; the progress down-stream amazingly rapid.
From farther away, walking shoreward across from the crested tide, figures, two.
The results show that offshore wind and shoreward wind have different effects on environment characteristics of evaporation.
He held the rope that held the boat, and tried to dog-paddle shoreward.
Travellers are making their way shoreward, back to the Zodiacs.
